_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Designing for everyone involves measurably improving the practice of inclusive, accessible and environmentally sustainable design in multiple teams or across your organisation; helping others understand and mitigate the influence of privilege and power on the design and delivery of content and services.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.326), LS-S-004 (LS, cosine: 0.310).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.396). Shared vocabulary: [across, teams]. DDaT-only terms [accessible, content, delivery, design, designing, environmentally] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, boundaries, build, cross, establishing, functional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.844, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 42-word DDaT element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Designing for everyone involves measurably improving the practice of inclusive," and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.441 ≈ STS 0.396 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [across, teams] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.4%. Shared tokens: [across, teams]. DDaT-only: [accessible, content, delivery, design, designing, environmentally]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, boundaries, build, cross, establishing, functional].
